title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Freshworks

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Freshworks
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Freshworks in Varanasi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Freshworks:
Freshworks is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Freshworks!
